privacyPolicyContent:
## Privacy Policy

This application (hereinafter referred to as "the App") recognizes the importance of protecting users' personal information and complies with the Act on the Protection of Personal Information (hereinafter referred to as the "Personal Information Protection Act").  
We strive for the appropriate handling and protection of personal information in accordance with the following privacy policy (hereinafter referred to as "this Privacy Policy").

---

### Article 1 (Definition of Personal Information)
In this Privacy Policy, personal information is defined as personal information under Article 2, Paragraph 1 of the Personal Information Protection Act.  
This refers to information about a living individual that can identify a specific individual by name, date of birth, or other descriptions contained in such information (including information that can be easily collated with other information, thereby identifying a specific individual), or information containing an individual identification code.

---

### Article 2 (Purpose of Use of Personal Information)
The App will use users' personal information for the following purposes:

- To provide the services of the App.  
- To provide guidance and respond to inquiries regarding the App.  
- To respond to acts that violate our terms, policies, etc. (hereinafter referred to as "Terms, etc.") regarding the App.  
- To notify users of changes to the Terms, etc. regarding the App.  
- To analyze and improve the usage of the App.  
- To create statistical data related to the use of the App.  
- For other tasks necessary for the operation of the App.  

---

### Article 3 (Proper Acquisition of Personal Information)
The App will acquire users' personal information by appropriate means.  
When acquiring personal information from users, the App will specify the purpose of use and acquire personal information within the necessary scope.

---

termsOfServiceContent:
## Terms of Service

### Article 1 (Application)
These Terms of Service (hereinafter referred to as "these Terms") shall apply to all relationships concerning the use of this application (hereinafter referred to as "the App").

---

### Article 2 (User Registration)
Those who wish to use the App shall apply for user registration by the method specified by the Company after agreeing to these Terms.  
The Company may not approve user registration if the applicant falls under any of the following items:

- If there are false statements, errors, or omissions in the registration details.  
- If the applicant has previously been subject to suspension of use due to a violation of these Terms.  
- In any other cases where the Company deems user registration to be inappropriate.  

---

### Article 3 (Prohibited Matters)
Users shall not engage in the following acts when using the App:

- Acts that violate laws or public order and morals.  
- Acts related to criminal activity.  
- Acts that infringe on the copyrights, trademark rights, or other intellectual property rights of the App, other users, or third parties.  
- Acts that interfere with the operation of the App, or acts that may do so.  
- Acts of registering or transmitting false information.  
- Acts that cause disadvantage, damage, or discomfort to other users or third parties.  
- Any other acts that the Company deems inappropriate.  

---

### Article 4 (Disclaimer)
The Company shall not be liable for any damage incurred by the user arising from the App.  
The content of the App may be changed, interrupted, or terminated without notice to the user.  
The Company shall not be responsible for any troubles that arise between users or between a user and a third party in connection with the use of the App.

---

### Article 5 (Changes and Suspension of Service Content)
